name: Disaster Recovery
description: Design disaster recovery strategy, backup and restore posture, continuity plans, failover approach, and recovery runbooks for severe outages, data corruption, ransomware-style disruption, or regional/provider failure. Use when the core problem is restoring critical services and data to explicit recovery targets (RTO/RPO), validating recovery readiness, prioritizing continuity investments, or turning resilience gaps into tested recovery plans.
not_for: routine uptime tuning with no major-failure scenario
basic deployment rollback planning in isolation
generic risk management writeups with no executable recovery design
assuming backups, snapshots, or replication automatically prove readiness
typical_inputs: critical business workflows and service tiers
